message:
chore(beads): upgrade bd tool from v0.32.1 to v0.43.0

This commit captures the beads tooling upgrade and associated config changes.

## Changes

### .beads/.gitignore
- Add sync-state.json and last-touched to ignored files
- Add .local_version to ignored files (prevents upgrade notification spam)
- Add redirect file pattern (worktree path file, machine-specific)
- Update comments to explain why negation patterns are not used
  (they would override fork protection in .git/info/exclude)

### .beads/.local_version
- Updated from 0.32.1 to 0.43.0
- Note: This file is now gitignored going forward, so future local
  version changes won't require commits

## Upgrade Process
1. Ran: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/steveyegge/beads/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
2. Killed old daemon: bd daemons killall
3. Migrated schema: bd migrate
4. Fixed issues: bd doctor --fix

## New Features Available in v0.43.0
- Improved schema with issues.pinned, dependencies.metadata, dependencies.thread_id
- Better sync branch handling
- Enhanced gitignore patterns for multi-repo workflows

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,11 +10,20 @@ daemon.lock
 daemon.log
 daemon.pid
 bd.sock
+sync-state.json
+last-touched
+
+# Local version tracking (prevents upgrade notification spam after git ops)
+.local_version
 
 # Legacy database files
 db.sqlite
 bd.db
 
+# Worktree redirect file (contains relative path to main repo's .beads/)
+# Must not be committed as paths would be wrong in other clones
+redirect
+
 # Merge artifacts (temporary files from 3-way merge)
 beads.base.jsonl
 beads.base.meta.json
@@ -23,7 +32,8 @@ beads.left.meta.json
 beads.right.jsonl
 beads.right.meta.json
 
-# Keep JSONL exports and config (source of truth for git)
-!issues.jsonl
-!metadata.json
-!config.json
+# NOTE: Do NOT add negation patterns (e.g., !issues.jsonl) here.
+# They would override fork protection in .git/info/exclude, allowing
+# contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.
+# The JSONL files (issues.jsonl, interactions.jsonl) and config files
+# are tracked by git by default since no pattern above ignores them.
